name: KASHER Capital, Inc.
description_short: KASHER Capital provides commercial financing solutions including SBA loans, working capital, equipment financing, and commercial real estate loans up to $500M for businesses nationwide.
description_long:
KASHER Capital, Inc. is a commercial finance lender based in Atlanta, GA that specializes in business and real estate financing. The company positions itself as a leader in commercial financing with a stated mission to help businesses secure the right kind of financing to support growth and development across various industries and business stages.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of commercial financing products including SBA loans, working capital solutions, commercial real estate financing, equipment financing, merchant cash advances, accounts receivable financing, purchase order financing, unsecured lines of credit, business lines of credit, fix and flip loans, franchise financing, healthcare financing, business-to-consumer financing, and supply chain financing. They claim to serve both new and existing businesses nationwide with financing options up to $500M. Their website emphasizes flexibility in how borrowed funds can be deployed—whether for expansion, hiring, marketing campaigns, or seizing growth opportunities.

KASHER Capital distinguishes itself by offering unsecured business lines of credit to customers with strong credit histories and emphasizing no collateral requirements for these products. They provide free consultations and position their financing as accessible to businesses of all types. The company also highlights supply chain financing as a solution that creates "win-win scenarios" for both buyers and suppliers by reducing costs and improving cash flows.

While the website presents a broad array of financing options, specific terms, interest rates, and approval requirements are not disclosed on the public-facing site. The company provides resource materials including funding calculators, FAQs, and industry-specific guides for Atlanta-area businesses, but actual lending criteria, typical APRs, and minimum credit score requirements remain unavailable without direct contact.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers unsecured business lines of credit with no collateral requirements for qualified borrowers
Provides financing up to $500M, covering both small business and larger commercial needs
Wide range of specialized financing options including SBA loans, equipment financing, and healthcare financing
Serves both new and existing businesses nationwide, not limited to specific business stages
Offers free consultations to help businesses identify the right financing product for their needs
Includes supply chain financing to improve cash flows for both buyers and suppliers
Provides free resources including funding calculators and industry-specific guides
cons: Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or typical approval requirements
No information provided about minimum credit score thresholds or qualification criteria
Limited transparency on processing timelines, approval rates, or average funding periods
No independent reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible on the website
Unsecured credit lines explicitly limited to customers with 'strong credit histories,' excluding many small businesses
best_for: Established businesses with strong credit seeking working capital or expansion financing
Commercial real estate investors and fix-and-flip operators in need of property financing
SBA loan applicants seeking an alternative lender with flexible approval criteria
Supply chain participants (buyers and suppliers) looking to optimize cash flow management
diagnosis: KASHER Capital is best suited for established businesses with strong credit profiles seeking commercial financing for expansion, real estate acquisition, or working capital needs. The primary caveat is that specific lending terms, rates, and qualification criteria are not publicly disclosed, requiring direct contact for pricing and approval probability assessment.
services: SBA loans for small business financing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
